ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motorcycles" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motorcycle */,
  "bike_name" TEXT /* Name of the motorcycle model */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the motorcycle in currency */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the motorcycle is located */,
  "kms_driven" INTEGER /* Total kilometers driven by the motorcycle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the motorcycle */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the motorcycle in years */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Engine power of the motorcycle in cc */,
  "brand" INTEGER /* Brand of the motorcycle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Overall condition of the motorcycle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the motorcycle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the motorcycle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the motorcycle's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motorcycles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the motorcycle owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner registered on the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the owner's profile image */,
  "is_seller" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is a seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motorcycle being listed */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner who created the listing */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the motorcycle was listed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., available, sold) */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the listing is featured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "images" TEXT /* Array of URLs of the motorcycle images */,
  "features" TEXT /* Array of additional features of the motorcycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES motorcycles ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner who received the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the buyer (1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the buyer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who provided the feedback */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing for which the feedback is given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing related to the analytics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the listing has received */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries made on the listing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the analytics */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the listing */,
  "total_feedbacks" INTEGER /* Total number of feedbacks received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing involved in the transaction */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Final sale price of the motorcycle */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer involved in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
